data.title: Mazzotta Rentals launches cloud-based RentalMan software by InTempo, enhancing operations and website redesign.
data.description: In Middletown, Connecticut, on October 3, 2025, Mazzotta Rentals, Inc. achieved a significant milestone by introducing RentalMan by InTempo, their innovative cloud-based rental software platform. This move signifies a crucial advancement in upgrading their operations and enhancing efficiency.

data.title: World Green Economy Summit in Dubai hosts high-level ministerial roundtable.
data.description: A high-level ministerial roundtable was held at the World Green Economy Summit in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The event gathered key government officials and industry leaders to discuss environmental initiatives and sustainable practices. The summit saw participation from over 200 delegates and featured significant discussions on green economy strategies.

data.title: EMCOR Group declares $0.25 quarterly dividend; payment on Oct 30, record date Oct 15, 2025. Fortune 500 leader in construction services.
data.description: A company headquartered in Norwalk, Connecticut, EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME), declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share. The dividend payment is scheduled for October 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 15, 2025. EMCOR Group, Inc. is a prominent Fortune 500 company specializing in mechanical and electrical construction services, industrial and energy infrastructure, and building services. For more information and additional news releases, refer to the company's official press releases.

data.title: Oracle customers face extortion scheme after major hacking campaign; urged to update software. Alphabet Inc. warns about high volume attack. No disclosed number of affected clients. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: E-Business Suite customers of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) have been informed about a series of extortion emails following a significant hacking attack. In a recent blog post, Oracle acknowledged that its clients received these extortion emails and advised them to update their software due to potential exploitation of known vulnerabilities by hackers. However, Oracle did not disclose the exact number of affected customers. Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) had previously issued a warning about the same issue, labeling it as a "high volume" hacking campaign. The ransomware group cl0p, linked to this extortion scheme by Google, mentioned that Oracle had experienced issues but declined to provide further information at the moment. For the latest stock price of ORCL, click here. The complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MSCI (NYSE: MSCI) to review Q3 2025 results on Oct 28; earnings release and presentation will be available online.
data.description: MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI), a top provider of essential decision support tools and services for investors globally, is set to unveil its third quarter 2025 results on Tuesday, October 28, 2025, before the market opens. Investors can access the earnings release, presentation, and quarterly update on MSCI’s Investor Relations website. Senior management will conduct a review of the performance for the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of PST Group AB on 27 Oct 2025 to discuss change of audit company and audit service fees.
data.description: An Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of PST Group AB has been scheduled for 27 October 2025, following the Board's resolution. The meeting will be located at PST Group AB, P. Puzino Str. 1, Panevezys, beginning at 11:00 (registration starting at 10:30). The accounting day for the event is 20 October 2025, and only individuals listed on the shareholder roster by the end of this date, proxies, or those with a voting rights transfer agreement are permitted to partake and vote. The agenda includes the discussion of changing the audit company and setting the audit service fees. The company's address is P. Puzino Str. 1, Panevezys, with the company code 147732969.

data.title: Gold price surpasses $3,880 per ounce, boosting junior mining companies amid a 99% rally and exploration boom.
data.description: In a recent news commentary from USA News Group on behalf of GoldHaven Resources Corp., it was reported that gold prices have exceeded $3,880 per ounce. This significant increase in value has presented a lucrative opportunity for junior mining companies, such as the VanEck Junior Gold Miners. The current market conditions indicate a favorable environment for investment and growth within the mining sector.

data.title: Global low-carbon construction materials market to reach $79.2 billion by 2030, growing at 3.0% CAGR from 2024 ($66.2 billion).
data.description: Dublin - A new report on Low-Carbon Construction Materials has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting a steady growth in the global market. Estimated at US$66.2 Billion in 2024, the market is expected to reach US$79.2 Billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.0% during the forecast period. The report offers detailed insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts to assist businesses in making informed decisions.

data.title: Jack Biegalski named CEO of Esmark Steel Group & Roberto Alvarez is new CEO of Esmark International. Reporting to James Bouchard.
data.description: In Sewickley, Pennsylvania, Esmark Steel Group, a subsidiary of Esmark, Inc., has named Jack Biegalski as the new Chief Executive Officer, starting October 1. Biegalski takes over from Roberto Alvarez, who is now the CEO of Esmark International. Biegalski will be reporting to James P. Bouchard, founder and Executive Chairman of Esmark Inc., and will join the executive leadership team. Alongside Biegalski, other executives reporting to Bouchard include Alvarez and Dave Luptak, CEO of Ohio Coatings Company-Tin Opera.

data.title: USA Rare Earth stock (NASDAQ: USAR) rises on talks with Trump administration, CEO confirms discussions, sparking speculation.
data.description: USA Rare Earth, Inc. saw a surge in its stock (NASDAQ: USAR) during premarket hours as investors reacted to news of ongoing discussions between the company's CEO and the Trump administration. CEO Barbara Humpton confirmed that talks are happening regularly, leading to speculation about a potential deal. This resulted in a notable increase in USA Rare Earth shares. The company is in close contact with the administration, as mentioned by Humpton in an interview with CNBC. The situation has sparked interest in the market, with the stock price experiencing significant movement. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Globalstar and Conekt.ai partner to offer private, public, and satellite IoT connectivity services with Band 53TM spectrum.
data.description: Covington, Louisiana, and San Diego have recently witnessed a strategic collaboration between Globalstar and Conekt.ai. Globalstar, listed on NASDAQ as GSAT, is a telecommunications infrastructure and technology provider. On the other hand, Conekt.ai is known for its connectivity management platform. The partnership aims to combine Globalstar's Band 53TM spectrum with XCOM RAN private network solutions through Conekt.ai’s orchestration platform. This initiative enables seamless multi-network connectivity. Conekt.ai will serve as the partner offering these services amidst the evolving telecommunications landscape.

data.title: TruBridge appoints Michael Daughton as Chief Business Officer on Oct 6, 2025, to strengthen rural and community healthcare.
data.description: TruBridge, a prominent player in revenue cycle management and healthcare technology for rural and community healthcare entities, made public the appointment of Michael Daughton as Chief Business Officer effective October 6, 2025. Daughton will be in charge of client-focused excellence and growth, directly reporting to the President and CEO, Chris Fowler. A seasoned healthcare strategist, Daughton's role signifies the company's commitment to bolstering its operational effectiveness and expanding its market influence.

data.title: Crimson Cup assists 5 new coffee shops to open in 6 months, empowering 1st-time entrepreneurs in 3 states.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, as of October 3, 2025, Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea is aiding aspiring entrepreneurs in bringing their coffee shop visions to life from Georgia to New York. Within a span of six months, a total of five independent coffee shops have successfully launched in three different states by following the company's 7 Steps to Success program.

data.title: Opera to enhance flagship and GX browsers with free native AI tools, alongside premium Opera Neon AI for advanced users. #OPRA
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on October 3, 2025, Opera, a prominent browser and AI firm listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OPRA, disclosed plans to enhance its free browser collection with browser-AI upgrades. These upgrades will be in addition to the premium Opera Neon AI browser tailored for tech-savvy users, marking a significant step in the company's browser development strategy. Opera is recognized for its innovative browser solutions and is looking to expand its offerings with these new enhancements.
